description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Testing that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.9 and 3.10 and Ansible 2.13.* and 2.14.*. For each matrix combination, it checks out the code, sets up Python, installs prerequisites, runs pytest tests, uploads generated SVGs as artifacts, publishes a job summary, tests installation in a virtual environment, and uploads coverage to Coveralls.
